candidates.name: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice
candidates.notes: Primary local high-quality baseline.

candidates.name: VoxCPM2
candidates.notes: Primary challenger; tokenizer-free diffusion-autoregressive stack.

candidates.name: dots.tts soar
candidates.notes: Main dots.tts quality candidate: highest zero-shot fidelity and speaker similarity variant.

candidates.name: IndexTTS2
candidates.notes: Expressiveness and controllability benchmark.

candidates.name: Fish Speech S2 Pro
candidates.notes: High-end comparison point; verify license before product use.

candidates.name: OmniVoice
candidates.notes: New multilingual zero-shot candidate.

candidates.name: MOSS-TTS v1.5
candidates.notes: Newer long-form/cloning candidate.

candidates.name: dots.tts mf
candidates.notes: MeanFlow distilled dots.tts latency candidate; compare quality/latency against soar.

candidates.name: Fun-CosyVoice3 0.5B 2512
candidates.notes: Modern small streaming zero-shot cloning candidate; Apache-2.0 and high HF adoption.

candidates.name: GLM-TTS
candidates.notes: MIT-licensed Chinese/English zero-shot cloning model with emotion and streaming claims.

candidates.name: FireRedTTS2
candidates.notes: Long-form multi-speaker streaming TTS with cross-lingual zero-shot cloning claims.

candidates.name: VoxCPM 0.5B
candidates.notes: Smaller Apache-2.0 VoxCPM candidate; likely worth comparing against VoxCPM2 for latency.

candidates.name: Higgs Audio v3 TTS 4B
candidates.notes: Watch-list model updated recently on Hugging Face.

candidates.name: Marco-Voice
candidates.notes: Apache-2.0 CosyVoice-compatible emotional cloning framework; low adoption so far.

candidates.name: VibeVoice 1.5B
candidates.notes: Very popular MIT long-form multi-speaker candidate; check current code availability and cloning API.

candidates.name: VibeVoice Realtime 0.5B
candidates.notes: High-adoption realtime model, but not a normal arbitrary WAV-cloning path; watch for voice-prompt support.

candidates.name: MioTTS 0.4B
candidates.notes: Small English/Japanese zero-shot cloning candidate with very low claimed RTF.

candidates.name: MioTTS 2.6B
candidates.notes: Larger English/Japanese MioTTS candidate; compare only if 0.4B is promising.

candidates.name: Irodori-TTS 500M v3
candidates.notes: Recent Japanese zero-shot cloning model with emoji style/effect controls; regional test candidate.

candidates.name: VieNeu-TTS v2 Turbo
candidates.notes: Vietnamese/English instant zero-shot cloning candidate; regional but current.

candidates.name: OpenF5 TTS Base
candidates.notes: Apache-2.0 F5-style alpha; lower priority because card says quality trails official NC F5-TTS.

candidates.name: Spark-TTS 0.5B
candidates.notes: Zero-shot cloning model but license is CC BY-NC-SA; keep as reference-only unless needed.

candidates.name: ZONOS2
candidates.notes: Watch-list model updated recently on Hugging Face.
